message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "Member" as Member
participant ":TicketDetailPage" as TicketDetailPage
participant ":TicketDetailContainer" as TicketDetailContainer
participant ":AttendanceService (Frontend)" as AttendanceServiceFrontend
participant ":Router" as Router
participant ":AttendanceHTTPTransport" as AttendanceHTTPTransport
participant ":AttendanceEndpoint" as AttendanceEndpoint
participant ":AttendanceService" as AttendanceService
participant ":RequesterService" as RequesterService
participant ":AttendanceCommand" as AttendanceCommand
participant ":AttendanceQuery" as AttendanceQuery

Member -> TicketDetailPage : Click "Yes" Button
TicketDetailPage -> TicketDetailContainer : handleConfirmation(input)
TicketDetailContainer -> AttendanceServiceFrontend : confirmAttendance(classId, payload)
AttendanceServiceFrontend -> Router : route("PATCH", "/v2/class/{class_id}/attendance/confirmation")
Router -> AttendanceService : Confirmation/AttendanceService, {IServerOption}
AttendanceService -> AttendanceEndpoint : Confirmation(context, payload)
AttendanceEndpoint -> AttendanceService : Validate()

alt "Data Valid?"
AttendanceService -> AttendanceQuery : GetPureModel(context, {ISliceCondition})
AttendanceQuery --> AttendanceService : ticket

alt "Ticket Status is Accepted"
AttendanceService -> AttendanceCommand : Register(context, {Ipayload})
AttendanceCommand --> AttendanceService : is updated
AttendanceService -> AttendanceCommand : UpdateRequestStatus(context, ticket)
AttendanceCommand --> AttendanceService : is updated
AttendanceService -> AttendanceEndpoint : is updated
AttendanceEndpoint -> AttendanceHTTPTransport : response := Response(is updated, nil)
AttendanceHTTPTransport -> Router : response
Router -> AttendanceServiceFrontend : response
AttendanceServiceFrontend -> TicketDetailContainer : response
TicketDetailContainer -> Member : response
else
AttendanceService -> AttendanceEndpoint : UnprocessableEntity
AttendanceEndpoint -> AttendanceHTTPTransport : UnprocessableEntity
AttendanceHTTPTransport -> Router : UnprocessableEntity
Router -> AttendanceServiceFrontend : UnprocessableEntity
AttendanceServiceFrontend -> TicketDetailContainer : UnprocessableEntity
TicketDetailContainer -> Member : UnprocessableEntity
end
@enduml
